title: Audit exemption advice
body: We will advise whether your company qualifies for audit exemption under the Companies Act 2006 and applicable thresholds. This does not constitute an audit opinion.

title: Independent examination (charities)
body: Where agreed, we will perform an independent examination of charity accounts in accordance with Charities SORP and applicable regulations.

title: No assurance provided
body: Unless expressly stated, our work does not constitute an audit, review, or other assurance engagement, and no opinion is expressed on the accuracy or completeness of your records.

title: HMRC enquiries and audits (out of scope)
body: HMRC enquiries, compliance checks, and investigations — including any audit or review of a return we have prepared — fall outside the scope of this engagement. Should HMRC open an enquiry or audit, the work involved in responding to it will be the subject of a separate engagement and charged in addition to the fees set out in this proposal. We will agree the scope and cost of that additional work with you before we begin.
